text.title: Accessibility Implementation Checklist
text.summary: Phase-by-phase checklist covering HTML semantics, ARIA, forms, keyboard, color, images/media, and automated testing.

list.item: Use header/nav/main/footer/article/section/aside elements
Single h1 per page; no skipped heading levels (h1 → h2 → h3)
Use button for clickable actions, a[href] for navigation
Use ul/ol for list content; never bare divs for groups
Add `lang` attribute to `<html>`; update on language switch
Provide a visible skip-link to `<main>` at the top of every page
Add aria-label to icon-only buttons (no visible text)
Add aria-describedby to inputs with helper/error text
Use aria-live="polite" for status messages; "assertive" for errors only
Add aria-invalid + aria-required to form fields as state changes
aria-hidden="true" only on decorative, non-focusable elements
Modals: role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="<h>-id"
Every input has <label htmlFor> or aria-labelledby (not placeholder)
required + aria-required on required fields
aria-invalid="true" + aria-describedby pointing to error span on validation failure
Use fieldset/legend for radio/checkbox groups
Error summary with role="alert" receives focus on submit failure
Error messages linked back to their field via anchor <a href="#field-id">
Test Tab order: matches visual top-to-bottom, left-to-right order
All interactive elements reachable and activatable by keyboard
Modals: focus trapped inside; Escape closes; focus restored to trigger
Composite widgets (tabs, listbox): roving tabIndex + arrow-key navigation
No keyboard trap outside intentional modal focus traps
Touch targets minimum 48×48 CSS px on mobile
Normal text ≥ 4.5:1 contrast; large text ≥ 3:1
UI components + focus indicators ≥ 3:1
Verify dark mode contrast separately
Color never sole means of conveying information
focus-visible style visible with ≥ 3:1 contrast against surrounding color
Meaningful alt text on informational images (not "image of...")
Decorative images: alt="" role="presentation"
Complex images: aria-describedby pointing to <figcaption> with full description
Video: <track kind="captions"> with both language options
Audio: transcript link adjacent to player
jest-axe: `expect(await axe(container)).toHaveNoViolations()` in every component test
Playwright + @axe-core/playwright: run axe on all key routes in CI
Lighthouse CI: categories:accessibility >= 0.95 threshold blocks merge
Test keyboard-only navigation in E2E (Tab through page, assert focus order)
Manual check: at least one screen reader (NVDA/Win, VoiceOver/macOS)
